questionHtml: An amplifier can increase the power of the signal by 12 dB. Determine the minimum number of amplifiers required.
markschemeHtml:
185 × 0.200 = 37 loss over length of cable

« 37 − 23 12 = 1.17» so two amplifiers are sufficient

 

[2 marks]
